name: Chocolate Coconut Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate chips in the top of a double boiler or in a microwave oven.
2. Set aside and cool to room temperature.
3. Place egg whites and cream of tartar in a mixer bowl. Beat at high speed, using an electric whisk, until stiff peaks form.
4. Gradually add sugar while continuing to beat on high speed.
5. Add flavorings and salt to the meringue, beating on low speed.
6. Gently fold in the melted chocolate.
7. Remove the whisk and stir in the coconut with a spoon.
8. Drop by heaping tablespoon onto a cookie sheet sprayed with pan spray or lined with aluminum foil.
9. Bake at 325°F for about 20 minutes, or until macaroons are not quite firm.
10. Remove from oven and let cool on wire rack.
11. Store in a loosely covered container at room temperature or freeze until needed. Do not cover tightly if storing at room temperature.
Yield: 20 servings
Food Exchanges per serving: 2/3 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
Calories: 86, Cho: 10g, PRO: 1g, FAT: 5g, Na:22mg, Cholesterol:0
